brand_guardrails: keep the scene simple and premium
composition: environment and hand detail as the focus
clear top and bottom safe zones
reference_strategy: Use editorial whitespace for framing and the cool palette anchor for morning atmosphere.
variation_guardrails: show a different angle than shot 01
preserve continuity through palette and light direction

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

sora_handoff.shot_goal: Reframe the moment away from stimulation and toward intentional daily design.
sora_handoff.subject_motion: Minimal hand movement and tiny ambient motion only.
sora_handoff.transition_out: Soft hold before the reveal shot.
sora_handoff.prompt: Animate this image into a premium vertical lifestyle detail shot that feels calm and intentional. Keep the same environment, palette, and morning light continuity as the previous shot. Use only subtle natural motion in the hand, curtain, or ambient scene. Do not invent new objects or aggressive movement. Keep the composition clean for later text overlay.

notes: Shot 02 of a coordinated March 25 reel set. Generate final selected output as .jpg.
